segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Good morning.
segments.zh: 早上好，有什么可以帮您的吗？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: What can I do for you?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I want to report a theft.
segments.zh: 我想报一起盗窃案。昨天有些东西从我包里被偷走了。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I had some things stolen out of my bag yesterday.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: I'm sorry to hear that.
segments.zh: 很遗憾听到这个。好，那我需要记录一些信息。可以先问下您的名字吗？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Right, so I'll need to take a few details.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Can I start with your name?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Louise Taylor.
segments.zh: 露易丝·泰勒。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: OK, thank you.
segments.zh: 好的，谢谢。请问您是英国居民吗？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And are you resident in the UK?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: No, I'm actually Canadian, though my mother was British.
segments.zh: 不是，我其实是加拿大人，不过我母亲是英国人。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And your date of birth?
segments.zh: 那您的出生日期呢？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: December 14th, 1977.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So you're just visiting this country?
segments.zh: 所以您只是来这个国家旅行/短暂停留？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 对。我几乎每年夏天都过来出差。我是一名室内设计师，来这里是为了买旧家具、古董之类的。这一带有很多很漂亮的东西，不过得跑到小镇上去才买得到。今年这趟原本很顺利，直到出了这档子事。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I come over most summers on business.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I'm an interior designer and I come over to buy old furniture, antiques you know.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: There are some really lovely things around here, but you need to get out to the small towns.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I've had a really good trip this year, until this happened.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。那您已经来了挺长时间了？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So you've been here quite a while?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Yes, I'm here for two months.
segments.zh: 是的，我这趟待两个月，下周就回去了。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I go back next week.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So may I ask where you're staying now?
segments.zh: 那我能问一下您现在住在哪里吗？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Well at present I've got a place at Park Apartments, that's on King Street.
segments.zh: 嗯，我目前住在国王街上的Park公寓（帕克公寓）。之前我住在同一条街上的河畔公寓，但那套只能租六个星期，所以我不得不另找了一套。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I was staying at the Riverside Apartments on the same street, but the apartment there was only available for six weeks so I had to find another one.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。公寓的门牌号是多少？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And the apartment number?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Fifteen.
segments.zh: 十五号。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Now, I need to take some details of the theft.
segments.zh: 现在，我需要记录一些盗窃的细节。您刚才说有东西从您包里被偷走了？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So you said you had some things stolen out of your bag?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 对。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And were you actually carrying the bag when the theft took place?
segments.zh: 盗窃发生的时候，包是背在您身上的吗？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的，我真的想不通。我背着双肩包，走进一家超市买点东西，等我打开包的时候，钱包就不见了。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I really can't understand it.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I had my backpack on.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: And I went into a supermarket to buy a few things and when I opened it up my wallet wasn't there.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And what did your wallet have in it?
segments.zh: 您钱包里都有什么？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Well, fortunately I don't keep my credit cards in that wallet – I keep them with my passport in an inside compartment in my backpack.
segments.zh: 幸好我没把信用卡放在那个钱包里——我把信用卡和护照一起放在双肩包的内层夹袋里。不过里面有不少现金……我想大概有250英镑吧。我昨天从账户里取了300英镑，但买了点东西，所以肯定已经花掉了大约50英镑。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: But there was quite a bit of cash there ... about £250 sterling, I should think.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I withdrew £300 from my account yesterday, but I did a bit of shopping, so I must have already spent about £50 of that.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: At first I thought, oh I must have left the wallet back in the apartment, but then I realised my phone had gone as well.
segments.zh: 起初我以为，哦我肯定是把钱包落在公寓里了，可后来我发现手机也不见了。那手机才买了一个星期，那时我才意识到自己被抢了。不管怎样，至少他们没拿走我租的车的钥匙。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: It was only a week old, and that's when I realised I'd been robbed.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Anyway at least they didn't take the keys to my rental car.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 好。那您说盗窃是昨天发生的？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So you say the theft occurred yesterday?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So that was September the tenth.
segments.zh: 那就是9月10日。您有没有任何头绪，东西可能是在哪里、什么时候被偷的？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And do you have any idea at all of where or when the things might possibly have been stolen?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Well at first I couldn't believe it because the bag had been on my back ever since I left the apartment after lunch.
segments.zh: 起初我简直不敢相信，因为自从午饭后我离开公寓，包就一直背在背上。它只是个小双肩包，但我旅行时一般都用它，因为感觉比手提包安全。总之，我和一个朋友碰面，我们在博物馆里待了大概两个小时。不过我确实记得，我们大约4点钟离开博物馆时，一群小男孩跑到我们跟前，把我们围得紧紧的，一直问我们几点了，然后突然就跑掉了。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: It's just a small backpack, but I generally use it when I'm travelling because it seems safer than a handbag.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Anyway, I met up with a friend, and we spent a couple of hours in the museum.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: But I do remember that as we were leaving there, at about 4 o'clock, a group of young boys ran up to us, and they were really crowding round us, and they were asking us what time it was, then all of a sudden they ran off.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Can you remember anything about them?
segments.zh: 您还记得他们的什么特征吗？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: The one who did most of the talking was wearing a T-shirt with a picture of something ... let's see ... a tiger.
segments.zh: 说话最多的那个穿着一件T恤，上面印着个图案……我想想……是只老虎。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好。您觉得他大概多大？

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Any idea of how old he might have been?

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Around twelve years old.
segments.zh: 大概十二岁左右。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And can you remember anything else about his appearance?
segments.zh: 关于他的长相，您还记得别的吗？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Not much.
segments.zh: 记不太清了。他挺瘦的……

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: He was quite thin ...

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Colour of hair?
segments.zh: 头发是什么颜色？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: I do remember that – he was blond.
segments.zh: 这个我记得——他是金发。其他人都是深色头发。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: All the others were dark-haired.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: And any details of the others?
segments.zh: 其他人还有什么细节吗？

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Not really.
segments.zh: 说不上来。他们来去太快了。

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: They came and went so quickly.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好。那我现在要给您一个案件编号，您可以拿它去联系保险公司。号码是十位数：87954 82361。

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So what I'm going to do now is give you a crime reference number so you can contact your insurance company.

segments.speaker: OFFICER
segments.en: So this is ten digits: 87954 82361.

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。那我该不该……

segments.speaker: LOUISE
segments.en: So should I ...

questions.title: Questions 1–10
instructions: Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 国籍即她所说的国民身份，直接说出 Canadian

paraphrase.explain: 问国籍，Louise 说 I'm actually Canadian。

items.prompt: Reason for visit: business (to buy antique ______)

pairs.note: 题干 antique 对应原文 antiques，同词
buy 后面接的正是要填的 furniture

paraphrase.explain: 她说 come over to buy old furniture, antiques，填 furniture。
She's got a place at Park Apartments，填 Park。

items.prompt: Items stolen: a wallet containing approximately £ ______

pairs.note: 题干 wallet 与原文同词
手机 gone 即被偷，被盗物之一是手机

paraphrase.explain: 她意识到 phone had gone as well，即另一件被偷物是 phone。

pairs.note: 偷窃日期即警官复述的 September the tenth

paraphrase.explain: OFFICER 确认 that was September the tenth，填 10(th) September。

items.prompt: Location: outside the ______ at about 4 pm

pairs.note: 离开博物馆时在其外面，即 outside the museum

paraphrase.explain: 离开 museum 约 4 点时男孩围上来，地点是 museum。

items.prompt: Details of suspect: some boys asked for the ______ then ran off

pairs.p: asking us what time it was
pairs.note: 问几点即问 time，填 time

pairs.p: then all of a sudden they ran off

paraphrase.explain: 男孩们 asking what time it was 然后跑掉，答案 time。

items.prompt: Details of suspect: he was about 12, slim build with ______ hair

pairs.note: blond 就是形容头发颜色，答案 blond(e)

paraphrase.explain: 问头发颜色，Louise 说 he was blond。

pairs.p: give you a crime reference number
pairs.note: give you 即分配 allocate 一个编号

paraphrase.explain: 警官给出十位案件编号 87954 82361。
